name: File Copy to External Device Detected
description: Detection of files being copied to external devices, indicating potential data exfiltration.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the file copy event.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname where the file copy was detected.

parameters.name: SubjectUserName
parameters.description: The user account who performed the file copy.

parameters.name: ObjectName
parameters.description: The full path to the file or directory on the external device that was accessed.

parameters.name: ObjectType
parameters.description: The type of object accessed (e.g., 'Removable Storage').

parameters.name: IpAddress
parameters.description: The IP address if the access was remote.
